task_completion.description: Log into OpenSIS using administrator credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login (look for 'admin' or administrator profile indicators).
A search result, student list, or student profile page displaying the name 'Sarah Connor' (Grade 10).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the student's Medical/Health records section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active tab or page title indicates 'Medical', 'Health', or 'Alerts' within Sarah Connor's student record.

task_completion.description: Enter the medical alert description and date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or input field containing the text 'Severe Peanut Allergy - EpiPen required' (or at least the keywords 'Peanut' and 'EpiPen') along with today's date.
A success message confirming the alert was added, or the new medical alert appearing in the list/table of active medical alerts for Sarah Connor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenSIS web interface rather than using terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenSIS application, with no terminal windows executing curl, SQL, or API commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is a web browser displaying the OpenSIS system, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or notes app.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are open and actively modifying the DOM to display the medical alert.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying records in OpenSIS. The agent must log in with username 'admin' and password 'Admin@123'. The target student is 'Sarah Connor'. The medical alert description must include the keywords 'Peanut' and 'EpiPen' (from 'Severe Peanut Allergy - EpiPen required'). Verify that the alert is added specifically to Sarah Connor's medical/health profile.
